summary: Iteration 73: BIQc Auth Resilience and Insights Tabs Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) /api/auth/supabase/me returns 200 with user profile (not 520), (2) BIQc Insights page loads with all 5 cognition tabs (Money, Revenue, Operations, People, Market), (3) Each tab shows metrics cards from cognitive snapshot, (4) Revenue tab shows Deal Pipeline section, (5) Money tab shows Best/Base/Worst case scenarios, (6) Operations tab shows Recommendations section, (7) People tab shows Calendar and Email Stress, (8) Market tab shows Competitor Signals, (9) Desktop has no horizontal scroll, (10) Login page Forgot Password link present.

issues: Initial cognitive data loading takes 30-40 seconds (shows CognitiveLoadingScreen). This is expected behavior when fresh data needs to be generated from Supabase Edge Function.

backend_auth_resilience.test_auth_me_returns_200: PASS - No 520 errors, returns user profile
backend_auth_resilience.test_login_returns_session: PASS - Returns valid session with access_token

frontend_login_page.forgot_password_link: PASS - data-testid='login-forgot-password' present with text 'Forgot password?'

money_tab.metrics: PASS - Runway, Margin, Spend cards visible

revenue_tab.metrics: PASS - Pipeline, Weighted, Concentration cards visible
revenue_tab.deal_pipeline: INFO - Section header visible but no deal cards (expected when no HubSpot data)

operations_tab.metrics: PASS - SLA Breaches, Task Aging, Bottleneck cards visible
operations_tab.recommendations: PASS - Recommendations section with actionable items

market_tab.competitors: PASS - Competitor Signals section with Accenture, Deloitte, PwC, KPMG

features_verified.auth_me_resilience: PASS - /api/auth/supabase/me returns 200 with user profile, fail-open to minimal profile on DB errors
features_verified.biqc_insights_5_tabs: PASS - All 5 cognition tabs (Money, Revenue, Operations, People, Market) present and clickable
features_verified.metrics_cards: PASS - Each tab shows relevant metrics from cognitive snapshot
features_verified.money_scenarios: PASS - Best/Base/Worst case scenario cards visible
features_verified.revenue_deals: INFO - Deal Pipeline section present but empty (no CRM data)
features_verified.operations_recs: PASS - Recommendations section visible with actionable items
features_verified.people_calendar_email: PASS - Calendar and Email Stress sections visible
features_verified.market_competitors: PASS - Competitor Signals section with company cards
features_verified.desktop_no_scroll: PASS - No horizontal scroll at 1920px viewport
features_verified.forgot_password_link: PASS - Link present on login page

critical_code_review_comments: auth_supabase.py verify_supabase_token (lines 178-228) correctly implements fail-open pattern - returns minimal profile on DB lookup failures
AdvisorWatchtower.js parseToGroups function correctly extracts enriched data from cognitive snapshot for all 5 tabs
Tab-specific panels (lines 288-358) properly render deals, scenarios, recommendations, calendar/email, competitors when data exists
All tab buttons have correct data-testid attributes (tab-money, tab-revenue, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 complete. Auth resilience fix verified - /api/auth/supabase/me returns 200 (not 520). BIQc Insights page has all 5 cognition tabs with enriched data. Note: Initial page load takes 30-40 seconds while cognitive data is generated from Supabase Edge Function. The detect_contradictions() SQL function is a migration file (016_detect_contradictions.sql) ready for manual deployment to Supabase - NOT auto-deployed.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: CRM (HubSpot) is REAL via Merge.dev. Cognitive data comes from Supabase Edge Function (biqc-insights-cognitive).

sql_migration_note: detect_contradictions() SQL function is in supabase/migrations/016_detect_contradictions.sql - NOT yet deployed to Supabase (user must run manually)
